screen.policy: drop classification == exclude for image_set_order; keep keep + borderline

notes.estimator: pairwise disagreement, grouped by permutation tuple; item-level bootstrap (percentile CI + one-sided p)
notes.d_same_decoder: P(disagree | same permutation) = decoder/sampling noise floor
notes.delta_gt0_bh_sig: BH-adjusted (within temperature) one-sided p<0.05 AND delta>0
notes.acc_swing: per-item (best - worst ordering accuracy) on per-ordering MODAL answer (decoder-cleaned): the accuracy cost of ordering
notes.acc_swing_on_answerable: acc_swing restricted to items correct under >=1 ordering (separates 'ordering flips a gettable item' from unanswerable)
notes.expected_acc: mean modal accuracy under a random ordering; gap to best_ord_acc is the realized cost
notes.parse_drift_flag: True if parse rate at this temp differs from T=0 by > --parse-drift-flag (confound guard)
notes.ci_note: delta_ci/acc_swing_ci are percentile bootstrap; significance from the one-sided bootstrap p (BH-adjusted)
